name: OV Bridge
description: OV Control Plane bridge. Registers ov_create_task for the Intake agent (first vertical slice).

apiBaseUrl.description: OV API base URL, e.g. https://ov.example/api/agent/v1 (https, or loopback/private host for tests).

serviceToken.description: OV service Bearer token. Prefer the OV_SERVICE_TOKEN env var; never commit this.

maxRetries.description: Additional attempts after the first for retryable failures. Default 2.
